keep.reason: Older recipe with version normalization (strips 'v' prefix, converts '-beta' to 'b'); pins release_id to 'latest' for stability

deprecate.reason: Same source, no version normalization; written ~6 weeks after jc0b's recipe

rationale.text: Both use GitHubReleasesInfoProvider against headmin/contour with the same asset_regex, both have CodeSignatureVerifier and EndOfCheckPhase, both expect the same Declarative IT GmbH (D6G4X4D7C9) signing identity.
jc0b normalizes the version string via FindAndReplace (strips leading 'v', maps '-beta' to 'b') and explicitly sets release_id='latest' with sort_by_highest_tag_names=true.
kevinmcox is a thinner wrapper without version normalization; tag/version output will include the upstream 'v' prefix.
jc0b first committed 2026-03-07; kevinmcox first committed 2026-04-18 (~6 weeks later).

keep.reason: Canonical recipe per ownership-transfer note; 4 downstream dependents across two repos

deprecate.reason: Functionally equivalent (same URLTextSearcher pattern, same code requirement) but only 1 dependent and no ownership signal

rationale.text: Both scrape ghostty.org/download with URLTextSearcher to extract the release.files.ghostty.org DMG URL, both have CodeSignatureVerifier with the same com.mitchellh.ghostty / 24VZTF6M5V requirement, and both have EndOfCheckPhase.
wardsparadox carries an explicit 'Originally created by @discentem, ownership transferred' comment and has 4 downstream dependents (almenscorner-recipes, wardsparadox-recipes children).
dataJAR has only 1 dependent and no ownership signal; the recipe-tracked first_commit (2018) appears to be a git-follow artifact rather than the actual recipe age.
dataJAR is plist (slight format preference), but dependent count and ownership note outweigh format here.

keep.reason: 10 years older, 4 dependents across two repos, exposes DOWNLOAD_URL as an Input variable for easy override

deprecate.reason: Functionally equivalent (same direct URL, same code requirement) but newly added (2026-04-14) with only 1 dependent

rationale.text: Both download from web.whatsapp.com/desktop/mac_native/release/?configuration=Release, both have CodeSignatureVerifier with the same net.whatsapp.WhatsApp / 57T9237FN3 requirement, and both have EndOfCheckPhase.
scriptingosx exposes DOWNLOAD_URL as an Input variable so downstream recipes can override the URL without forking; 4 downstream dependents include peshay-recipes children.
gmarnin hardcodes the URL inside URLDownloader and was added 2026-04-14 with only 1 dependent.
scriptingosx first committed 2016-04-13; gmarnin first committed 2026-04-14 (a decade later). Both are plist.

existing_prs.title: Changes to the download and parent GIMP recipes
Download URLs have changed slightly in GimpUniversal.download.recipe

sets.skip_reason: Different patterns: hjuutilainen-recipes ships a single-arch download parameterized by an ARCH input variable, while MLBZ521-recipes and moofit-recipes ship pseudo-universal recipes that download both arm64 and x86_64 DMGs in one run for downstream combined packaging. GIMP does not publish a true universal binary, so per the evaluation rules pseudo-universal variants are ignored when comparing — leaving the hjuutilainen recipe with no like-for-like duplicate.
